name: UltraCBF (Next-Gen Sub-Tick Engine)
description: Zero-allocation, lock-free sub-tick input engine with QPC micro-timestamping, real-time hardware benchmarking, and cache-aligned queues for GD 2.2081.

benchmark-overlay.name: Performance & Latency Benchmark HUD
benchmark-overlay.description: Displays real-time hardware polling rate (Hz), sub-tick input dispatch latency (µs), jitter, and CPU overhead on PlayLayer.

polling-mode.name: Hardware Polling Precision
polling-mode.description: High-frequency lock-free QPC capture mode for 1000Hz-8000Hz gaming peripherals.

deduplication.name: High-Hz Event Deduplication
deduplication.description: Hardware bounce deduplication filter. Set to OFF for Wooting / Hall Effect magnetic switches.

subtick-extrapolation.name: Micro-Step Extrapolation
subtick-extrapolation.description: Calculates exact continuous sub-tick displacement vectors at sub-millisecond timestamps.
